packageName: 6N7D – Vietnam Standard Package with Day Cruise
summaryItinerary: Day 1: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
Day 2: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise (Breakfast + Local Lunch)
Day 3: Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town (Breakfast)
Day 4: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (Breakfast)
Day 5: Da Nang Departure – Ho Chi Minh Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Cu Chi Tunnels (Breakfast)
Day 6: Ho Chi Minh – Join Group Day Tour to Mekong Delta (Breakfast)

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour (No meal)
details: Arrive in Ha Noi, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
13:30: Visit Tran Quoc Pagoda located on Golden Fish Island in West Lake.
14:30: Continue to visit Temple of Literature – the first university of Vietnam
15:30: Keep going to visit Hoa Lo Prison to learn about Vietnam's colonial history
16:30: Our bus will take you back to the hotel for check-in.
Free leisure and overnight in Ha Noi City

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise (Breakfast + Lunch)
details: Have breakfast at hotel
Full day cruise experience in Ha Long Bay with lunch included

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town (Breakfast)
details: Have breakfast at hotel and do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you to the Noi Bai International Airport as your departure flight to Da Nang City
Arrive in Da Nang City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Do hotel check-in at 14:00 PM
15:15 - 15:45: Our driver and guide pick you up from your hotel
Visit Ngu Hanh Son (Marble Mountain)
18:00: Depart to Hoi An Ancient Town.
Visit Hoi An Ancient Town, with Japanese Bridge and colorful lanterns
21:00 Drop off at your hotel.
Overnight in Da Nang

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge (Breakfast)
details: Have breakfast at hotel
07:30 - 08:30: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel, depart for Ba Na Hill
09:00: Arrive in Ba Na, experience the cable system and beautiful sights
Visit Golden Bridge, French Village, Linh Ung Pagoda, and Fantasy Park
17:00 -17:30: Drop off at your hotel.
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang Departure – Ho Chi Minh Arrival – Join Group Cu Chi Tunnels Afternoon Tour (Breakfast)
details: Have breakfast at hotel and do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you directly to the Da Nang International Airport as your departure flight to Ho Chi Minh City
Arrive in Ho Chi Minh City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
12:30 – 13:00: Pick up at your hotel and depart to Cu Chi Tunnels
Explore the remaining area and tunnel systems
19:30: Return to hotel in Saigon for check-in
Free leisure and overnight in Ho Chi Minh City

detailedItinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh – Join Group Day Tour to Mekong Delta (Breakfast)
details: Have breakfast at hotel
7:30 – 8:00: Leaving Ho Chi Minh City and start your trip to depart for My Tho
Visit Vinh Trang pagoda and cruise down the river
Stop over at Unicorn Island, go walking around country lane
Visit the fruit plantation and local businesses
17:30: Return to Ho Chi Minh City
Free leisure and overnight in Ho Chi Minh City

detailedItinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Departure (Breakfast)
details: Have breakfast at hotel
Do hotel check-out before 12:00 PM
Our driver will take you directly to the Tan Son Nhat International Airport as your departure flight
TOUR ENDS. Thank you for booking with us!

includes: Roundtrip airport transfer by private 7-seat car without guide
Roundtrip transport Ha Noi - Ha Long by Shuttle Bus without guide
Meals mentioned in Itinerary: 7 Breakfast + 1 Lunch
06 nights accommodation at standard room in hotel
Water in tours: 1 bottle of 500ml/person/day tour
Tours and Transfer are on Sharing Basic with good condition coach and local guide speaking English
excludes: Wax Museum, Wine Cellar Debay, Alpine Coaster Entrance Ticket and Games with coins in Ba Na Hills
Drink on Cruise, during Meals and Surcharge for Beverages brought on Cruise
Other meals and services than mentioned
Laundry, telephone calls and expenditure of a personal nature
Early check-in and late check-out at all hotels
Unforeseen expenses in the event of tour cancellation due to force majeure situations

hotels.property: Yarra Ocean Suites Da Nang Hotel (4-star)
hotels.room: 2 Yarra Partial Ocean View Double Room

notes: Hotels are subject to availability. Check-in time: 14:00 PM and Check-out time: 12:00 PM
Flight fares are subject to change
Validity of the passport should be a minimum of 6 months from the intended return date
Please print out the E Visa for smooth immigration process
We are not responsible for your lateness for the Joint in Tour
Meals inclusive during Joint in Tour will be served in local restaurant
Children from 10 years old are considered adults
Any transportation outside of the scheduled times may incur additional charges
policy.validity: Rates are subject to availability and confirmation at time of booking.
deposit: 1st payment: 50% on total group booking upon confirmation
2nd payment: the remaining balance 50% will be paid 10 days before the arrival
cancellation: Flights and VISA fee is non-refundable
7 days prior to departure date: 100% of reservation cost (after deduction of flights and VISA fee)
8-14 days prior to departure date: 50% of reservation cost (after deduction of flights and VISA fee)
15-29 days prior to departure date: 25% of reservation cost (after deduction of flights and VISA fee)
30 or more days prior to departure date: 10% of reservation (after deduction of flights and VISA fee)
terms: Any overstay expenses due to delay or change or cancellation in flight will be on the guests own
The passengers must ensure on their own that they have a valid passport and other required documents
We do not accept any responsibility if the passenger cannot travel because of a passport or visa issue
